steps.title: Fit the product as a quadratic
steps.content: The product of two linear functions is quadratic. In Desmos, evaluate $g(x)h(x)$ at three inputs and regress the result to $ax^2+bx+c$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: Choice D is $\frac{10x^2}{7}+6x-\frac{56}{5}$, so D is correct. The FOIL check gives the same middle term: $-2x+8x=6x$.
